heroSubtitle: You shouldn't have to figure out IP alone.
subheadline: Community IP helps underserved inventors understand intellectual property, connect with support, and take the next step toward protecting their ideas.
nonprofitTag: 501(c)(3) nonprofit · IP access for underserved inventors

heroImage.alt: Young inventor building and testing a prototype at a worktable

missionText: Community IP's mission is to help underserved inventors obtain intellectual property.

whatCommunityIPDoes.title: What Community IP does
whatCommunityIPDoes.description: We connect inventors with education, mentoring, and needs-based IP support — so talent isn't lost for lack of access.

stakeholderQuote.quote: Access and exposure matter as much as talent. Community IP exists so underserved inventors don't have to figure out IP alone.

getInvolved.title: Ways to connect with Community IP
getInvolved.description: Whether you need help, want to volunteer, explore a partnership, or support our mission — start here.

supportSection.description: Your contribution funds education workshops, mentoring access, and needs-based IP support for inventors who might otherwise be left out — subject to program capacity.
supportSection.footnote: Donations support our nonprofit mission. Program support depends on availability and eligibility.
